Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}So much power, so much chaos... I'd not be foolish enough to turn my back on such a predator.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}And on top of that, we have an unexpected guest tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Not a very favorable situation, all things considered.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}So, given this little predicament, how do you intend to partake?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}"The enemy of my enemy is my friend," is it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Very well. Let's see what you're capable of.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}However, if you're not up to the task, I might just take you out with it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}So long as you aren't against me, I will allow it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I don't know what our foe is capable of, but I trust you can protect yourself?[n]{f 1 1}
